probe_urls.label: ParlParse overview
probe_urls.expected_value: Confirms ParlParse is structured public UK Parliament data and engine behind TheyWorkForYou/Public Whip.

probe_urls.label: ParlParse Hansard data notes
probe_urls.expected_value: Confirms XML debates data and whether divisions/votes are labelled.

probe_urls.label: ParlParse members data notes
probe_urls.expected_value: Confirms member identifiers and where voting-record data is directed.

probe_urls.label: ParlParse GitHub repository
probe_urls.expected_value: Confirms repository structure and available directories.

inspection_questions: Does the source expose structured division/vote records?
Does it go back to the 1983 start point needed for Corbyn?
Can Jeremy Corbyn be matched by stable person/member ID?
Can future rows be traced to a source URL or source identifier?
What licence or attribution notes must be kept?
